heading: Legislative Assistant to the Commandant
label: 8047 Legislative Assistant to the Commandant
text: There is in the Marine Corps a Legislative Assistant to the Commandant.
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 5047 of this title2016— struck out second sentence which read as follows: “An officer assigned to that position shall be in a grade above colonel.”Pub. L. 114–328

Effective Date of 2018 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with provision for the coordination of amendments and special rule for certain redesignations, see , set out as a note preceding .Pub. L. 115–232section 800 of Pub. L. 115–232section 3001 of this titleFeb. 1, 2019
